name: Kyokuto Sanki Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kyokuto Sanki Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of professional machines and tools in Japan. Its Professional segment offers interior construction equipment, such as automatic wallpaper gluing machines; sign/display related equipment that comprise film laminating machines; tapes for interior work and related tools; computer software; and Tatami manufacturing equipment, which include computer-type Tatami manufacturing system, as well as related tools/auxiliary materials. The company's Consumer segment engages in the sale of interior products, such as special function tatami mats; provision of remodeling and sliding doors for general households; and sale and construction of industrial and residential solar power generation systems and storage batteries, as well as offers home remodeling work. Its Industry segment develops and manufactures industrial equipment; and sells food equipment for kitchen comprising multi-dispensers. The company was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tatsuno, Japan.
